_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of industry-standard and organizationally accepted analysis principles and methods.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of product management practices as applied to data products, including roadmap prioritization, consumer discovery, feedback loops, and value measurement.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI DQ domain. DQ-K-016 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-S-003 (DA, cosine: 0.486), RC-K-001 (RC, cosine: 0.481).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.4/10 (raw 0.442). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [accepted, analysis, industry, methods, organizationally, principles] vs WIDAI-only terms [applied, consumer, data, discovery, feedback, loops] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.880 (P=0.896, R=0.865). P exceeds R by 0.031 — the DCWF element's 10 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 20 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: mixed signal (E:0.0%, N:67.1%, C:32.9%). No dominant classification for "Knowledge of industry-standard and organizationally accepted analysis principles" vs "Knowledge of product management practices as applied to data products, including" — the relationship is genuinely ambiguous from a logical inference perspective.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.499 > STS 0.442 (gap +0.057). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [knowledge] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 11.1%. Shared tokens: [knowledge]. DCWF-only: [accepted, analysis, industry, methods, organizationally, principles]. WIDAI-only: [applied, consumer, data, discovery, feedback, loops].
